//: Project-scoped MCP servers, checked in so every dev/agent shares the same tools. Replace placeholders with your real endpoints/commands. Never commit secrets — use env var expansion (${VAR}).

github.//: Source of truth for PRs/issues used by the build-time agents. Configure per Claude Code's GitHub MCP docs.
